publishedAbstract: In some instances, it may be necessary to validate objects/object integrity through an internal tool developed by the NooBaa/Mulicloud Object Gateway (MCG) Engineering team. Usually, Engineering will request the s3cat tool to be used, along with output deliverables via BugZilla case or Engineering engagement. This solution will cover the use of this tool. **NOTE:** Bucket information (bucket, endpoint, credentials, etc.) can be obtained
publishedTitle: Using the s3cat Internal NooBaa Tool - OpenShift Data Foundation
